description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for Windows that triggers on push. Run a job on a Windows 2019 environment that checks out the repository with tags and submodules, sets up Python 3.8 x64, installs NuGet and InnoSetup, builds and installs Sentry, configures and builds the project with CMake, and publishes a release. Additionally, if the push is a tag, set up Sentry CLI and upload PDB files for stack unwinding.
